headline_seed: Former Fauci aide charged with conspiring to evade Covid-related records requests - Politico
draft_text:
Dr. David Morens, 78, former senior NIAID adviser, indicted on federal charges for allegedly concealing records to evade FOIA during COVID-19. Politico and The Guardian confirm two unindicted co-conspirators are referenced but not named.

And that's the mews.
